reforms.description: The reform of the innovation system aims to enhance productivity and competitiveness by strengthening the digital transformation of industry, developing a startup ecosystem, and providing additional support for selected sectoral activities. The support system has been streamlined, and new R&D tax incentives have been introduced.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the innovation system, the reform is expected to boost productivity and competitiveness, leading to higher economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform of the innovation system was announced as part of key policy initiatives.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the innovation system, which is crucial for enhancing Lithuania's economic competitiveness and productivity.
reforms.source_quote: A reform of the innovation system to raise productivity and competitiveness, which strengthens the digital transformation of the industry, helps develop a start-up ecosystem, and provides additional support for selected sectoral activities.

reforms.description: The government plans to set up a National Development Institution to ensure sufficient financing of small innovative firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing targeted funding to small innovative firms, the initiative aims to enhance their capacity for growth and innovation, which can contribute positively to economic development.
reforms.status_evidence: The government plans to set up a National Development Institution.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a National Development Institution represents a significant structural change aimed at improving access to finance for innovative firms, which is crucial for enhancing the overall innovation ecosystem in Lithuania.
reforms.source_quote: The government plans to set up a National Development Institution, to ensure sufficient financing of small innovative firms.

reforms.description: The government aims to improve the governance of the innovation system by strengthening coordination and consolidating agencies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing governance and coordination within the innovation system is expected to lead to more effective policy implementation and better outcomes for innovation performance.
reforms.status_evidence: Improve the governance of the innovation system by strengthening coordination and by consolidating agencies.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in how the innovation system is managed, aiming for a more cohesive and effective approach to fostering innovation across sectors.
reforms.source_quote: Improve the governance of the innovation system by strengthening coordination and by consolidating agencies.

reforms.description: The Lithuanian government authorized the establishment of a National Development Institution to ensure credit for SMEs, addressing high rejection rates for loan applications and supporting long-term investments.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating access to credit for SMEs, the reform aims to enhance innovation and economic resilience, particularly during downturns.
reforms.status_evidence: The Parliament authorized the government to launch the procedures for the establishment of the institution.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a National Development Institution represents a significant structural change aimed at improving access to finance for SMEs, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: In June 2020, the Parliament authorised the government to launch the procedures for the establishment of a National Development Institution that will rely on the pooled competence of three existing institutions.

reforms.description: The Lithuanian government plans to establish the Innovation Promotion Fund in 2021 to ensure effective financing of R&D and innovation activities, making it easier for innovative businesses to obtain funds.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to increase public funding for R&D, which is currently low, thereby enhancing innovation capacity and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government plans to establish the Innovation Promotion Fund in 2021.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a dedicated fund for innovation represents a significant structural change in the funding landscape for R&D in Lithuania, aiming to boost overall innovation performance.
reforms.source_quote: The government plans to establish in 2021 the Innovation Promotion Fund, aiming to ensure effective financing of R&D and innovation activities.

reforms.description: Measures to improve the coordination and effectiveness of innovation policy include the creation of the Science, Technology and Innovation Council in 2019, which aims to enhance stakeholder engagement.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improved coordination among stakeholders is expected to enhance the effectiveness of innovation policies, leading to better outcomes in R&D and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The Science, Technology and Innovation Council was created in 2019.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the council represents a significant step towards better governance of innovation policy, although it is part of a broader reform effort.
reforms.source_quote: Measures to improve the co-ordination and effectiveness of innovation policy include the creation of the Science, Technology and Innovation Council in 2019.

reforms.description: Lithuania introduced a new funding formula for universities and research institutions that considers science-business collaboration and international R&D programmes, aiming to enhance the effectiveness of public research funding.
reforms.component_name: New funding formula for research institutions
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By aligning funding with collaboration efforts, the reform is expected to enhance research output and innovation capacity, ultimately benefiting the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The new funding formula was introduced and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how public research funding is allocated, promoting collaboration between academia and industry, which is crucial for innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A new funding formula for research institutions was introduced taking into account science-business collaboration and international R&D programmes.

reforms.description: The establishment of science and technology parks for start-ups attached to universities aims to foster innovation and enhance collaboration between academia and the private sector.
reforms.component_name: Science and technology parks for start-ups
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing a supportive environment for start-ups, the parks are expected to stimulate innovation and economic growth through new business development.
reforms.status_evidence: The establishment of science and technology parks is part of the ongoing reforms to enhance innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it directly supports the growth of start-ups and enhances the innovation ecosystem, although it is part of a broader reform package.
reforms.source_quote: Measures include... the establishment of science and technology parks for start-ups attached to a university.

reforms.description: In 2020, the Lithuanian government launched a requalification programme aimed at highly-skilled professionals across all regions to reduce skills mismatch and improve alignment with local labor market needs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills of the workforce, the programme aims to improve employability and productivity, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government launched the requalification programme in 2020.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme addresses a significant issue of skills mismatch in the labor market, which is crucial for improving regional economic performance.
reforms.source_quote: In 2020 the government launched a requalification programme for highly-skilled professionals in all regions, thought to reduce skills mismatch.

reforms.description: The government is preparing new legislation to provide universities with more incentives to improve quality and align closer to labor market needs, aiming to encourage consolidation among institutions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the quality of higher education and aligning it with labor market demands, the reform is expected to improve the skill set of graduates, thereby supporting productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is currently preparing new legislation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses the need for better alignment of higher education with labor market needs, which is significant for improving the overall quality of education and workforce skills.
reforms.source_quote: The government is currently preparing new legislation providing universities with more incentives to deliver on quality and closer to the labour market.

reforms.description: Lithuania has implemented the Next Generation Access Infrastructure (NGA) to ensure high-speed access to digital services, particularly in rural areas, aiming to reduce the digital divide and improve connectivity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital infrastructure enhances productivity and access to services, fostering economic growth in underserved areas.
reforms.status_evidence: The Ministry of Transport and Communications is currently implementing the NGA.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant investment in digital infrastructure, which is crucial for economic development and reducing regional disparities.
reforms.source_quote: The Ministry of Transport and Communications is currently implementing the Next Generation Access Infrastructure (NGA) to ensure high-speed access.
